items.name: Strapped Black Silk Sock Wood Platform Heels
items.description:
These iconic heels, notorious for the risk originate from the Spring/Summer 2009 (SS 2009) collection from Atelier Siphions.

It features a silk black sock alongside a wooden platform heel, a risky yet stylish choice.

These heels fit with the It Girl Platform bundle: 
https://www.roblox.com/bundles/894898/It-Girl-Style-Platform-Doll

Pair it with the accompanying pieces in the S/S 2009 collection.
